overall_justification: The newspaper edition primarily reports on the Sergipe political situation and the congressional debates surrounding it. While the Caixa de Conversão is mentioned, it's only to note that its discussion was postponed. The article's focus is on the political maneuvering in Congress, not the economic arguments for or against the Caixa. There is no clear editorial endorsement of either the Orthodox or Expansionist position regarding the Caixa itself.

supporting_evidence.quote: Apesar de constar da ordem do dia, não foi discutido hontem, na Câmara dos Deputados, o projecto que crea a Caixa de Conversão.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This statement confirms that the Caixa de Conversão was on the agenda but not debated, indicating the article's focus is elsewhere.

supporting_evidence.quote: Devia falar o sr. Affonso Costa, combatendo o projecto, e não o fez pelo adeantado da hora em que a Câmara terminou a discussão e votação do parecer da commissão de constituição e justiça sobre o caso de Sergipe.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This reinforces that the Sergipe issue took precedence over the Caixa debate, further supporting the neutral classification.
